# Pillar maze: 10 square columns in an open room
# Ten 10 x 10 cm pillars scattered symmetrically in a 500 x 500 cm space.
# Tests lidar shadow detection and path-finding around isolated obstacles.
# All areas between pillars are accessible (min gap ≥ 50 cm > 30 cm).
# Generated by scripts/generate_test_maps.py
